raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and whether the stated deliverable coheres with the claimed method contribution.","R1.2":"A general opinion on the draft centrally includes checking whether the argument chain is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The delegation calls for judging whether the reported experiments and setup support the claims made in the artifact.","R1.4":"Because the artifact makes explicit first-work and no-prior-work claims, assessing novelty is a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection of an open-ended judgment must disclose uncertainty about unstated expectations and unavailable external context.","RX.2":"The response must avoid validating strong claims such as guarantees, firstness, or benchmark centrality beyond what the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within projection rather than performing the requested judgment or editing the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported scholarly positioning downstream.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should be traceable to the delegation wording and specific features of the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of the thesis, contribution framing, and whether the stated deliverable coheres with the claimed method contribution.
rationale.R1.2: A general opinion on the draft centrally includes checking whether the argument chain is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation calls for judging whether the reported experiments and setup support the claims made in the artifact.
rationale.R1.4: Because the artifact makes explicit first-work and no-prior-work claims, assessing novelty is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of an open-ended judgment must disclose uncertainty about unstated expectations and unavailable external context.
rationale.RX.2: The response must avoid validating strong claims such as guarantees, firstness, or benchmark centrality beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within projection rather than performing the requested judgment or editing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported scholarly positioning downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should be traceable to the delegation wording and specific features of the artifact.
